_comment: Seed labeled set for the match-quality harness. Grades: 3=perfect, 2=relevant, 1=weak/edge, 0=irrelevant. This is a SCAFFOLD: grow it from real digests (eval/import_events.py). The three users cover the core India+remote personas.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Python/Django)
jobs.description: We are hiring a backend engineer to build payment APIs in Python and Django. You will work with PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker and AWS to design microservices. Strong Python and Django experience required.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer, Go & Microservices
jobs.description: Backend developer role building microservices. Python, Go, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes. 4+ years backend experience. REST APIs and distributed systems.

jobs.title: Staff Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Staff engineer to lead backend architecture. Python, microservices, PostgreSQL, AWS. 9+ years of experience building large scale distributed backend systems required.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer (React + Python)
jobs.description: Full stack role. Frontend in React and TypeScript, backend in Python and Django. PostgreSQL and Docker. You will own features end to end.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Backend engineer, Python, Django, PostgreSQL, AWS. US-based only, on-site in San Francisco. Microservices and Docker.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer (NLP)
jobs.description: ML engineer working on NLP and LLM systems. Python, PyTorch, machine learning, deep learning, transformers. Build and deploy large language model pipelines. 3+ years machine learning experience.

jobs.title: Applied Scientist, Generative AI
jobs.description: Applied scientist for generative AI. Machine learning, deep learning, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LLM, NLP. Research and ship models. Strong machine learning background.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Data scientist role. Python, statistics, machine learning, SQL. Build models and dashboards. Some NLP exposure helpful.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer (React)
jobs.description: Frontend developer building UI in React, TypeScript, JavaScript and CSS. Next.js experience a plus. Build delightful web experiences. 1+ year frontend experience.

jobs.title: Junior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Junior frontend engineer. React, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, HTML. Entry level, 0-2 years. Work on the trading web app frontend.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Architect
jobs.description: Senior frontend architect. React, TypeScript, Next.js, micro-frontends. 8+ years frontend experience leading large teams and design systems.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: DevOps engineer. AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD. Manage cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Product manager for the seller platform. Define roadmap, work with engineering and design. 4+ years product management.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
jobs.description: Backend engineer building APIs in Node.js. Some Python services. PostgreSQL, Redis, microservices, AWS, Docker. 3+ years backend experience.
